# UNO With Friends

> UNO With Friends is a free-to-play browser card game featuring full implementations of Classic UNO, UNO Flip (with Light and Dark sides), and UNO No Mercy (with stacking rules, 25-card mercy elimination, Wild Draw 6/10, Skip Everyone, Discard All, and custom avatars).

This website allows users to host online multiplayer lobbies, join rooms with custom codes, or play against smart AI bot opponents without downloads, ads, or signups.

## Game Modes

- [Classic UNO](https://unomultiplayer.me/): Play standard UNO rules with up to 4 players or AI bot opponents.
- [UNO No Mercy](https://unomultiplayer.me/): The ultimate UNO experience featuring extreme stacking, 25-card mercy rule elimination, 0/7 hand swaps, Skip Everyone, and Discard All.
- [UNO Flip](https://unomultiplayer.me/): Play with dual sides—the Light Side and the Dark Side, featuring severe penalties like Draw 5 and Wild Draw Color.

## Site Pages

- [Home Page - Play Game](https://unomultiplayer.me/index.html.md): The main page to join lobbies, create rooms, and play UNO multiplayer online.
- [About Us](https://unomultiplayer.me/about.html.md): Information about the project, mission, developer, rules, and game modes.
- [Contact Us](https://unomultiplayer.me/contact.html.md): Get in touch with the development team for feedback, bug reports, and features.
- [Privacy Policy](https://unomultiplayer.me/privacy.html.md): User data handling policy, local storage usage, and cookies.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://unomultiplayer.me/terms.html.md): Rules of use, acceptable game use, and liability disclaimers.
